title: ASR Outdoor 7/32" Chain Saw Diamond Sharpening Burr 1/8" Shank 120 Grit
description:
This chain saw sharpening burr is just what the doctor ordered to sharpen your blade! Coated with diamond dust, this ensures that the blade will be sharpened quickly and well. The total length is 1" with a 120 grit. For 7/32" chainsaw blades, and 1/8" shank diameter. This is a must have for anyone who works or dabbles in woodworking, home improvement, construction, or any kind of craft that requires a sharp chainsaw. The durable construction and diamond coating will ensure this burr will last. Don't forget one of these for your toolbox!
